features: The 4 way plug & USB adapter with surge protection is ideal for creating more power sources hassle free, Just plug it into any standard UK 3 pin plug socket to have 4 power sources instantly! With no trailing wires it's safe and easy to install, all you need to do is simply plug it in, The 4 Way Socket is fitted with a built-in surge protection to avoid overloading and is suitable for all UK 13amp 3-pin sockets, Max Load: 3000w, USB Output: 1000mAh x 2, Voltage: 230-240v
